message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 11 VT conformance fixtures for uncovered areas

Cover SS2/SS3 single shifts, DECALN edge cases, REP with SGR/pending-wrap,
IRM insert mode, DECSTR single-shift reset, CUP with origin mode, and
IL at scroll region boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "decaln_overwrites_content",
+  "description": "DECALN overwrites existing content and SGR attributes with plain 'E'",
+  "initial_size": [5, 2],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b316d 4142434445 1b2338",
+  "comment": "Set bold (SGR 1). Print ABCDE (fills row 0 with bold). DECALN (ESC # 8) fills all cells with 'E'. Row 0 should have plain 'E' (no bold). Cursor at (0,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+{
+  "name": "decaln_with_scroll_region",
+  "description": "DECALN (ESC # 8) fills the entire screen with 'E' regardless of scroll region",
+  "initial_size": [5, 4],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b323b3372 1b2338",
+  "comment": "Set scroll region to rows 2-3 (CSI 2;3 r), then DECALN (ESC # 8). DECALN fills ALL rows with 'E', ignoring scroll region. Cursor moves to (0,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 4, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "irm_shifts_then_writes",
+  "description": "IRM insert mode shifts existing content right before writing new character",
+  "initial_size": [5, 2],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142434445 1b5b313b3148 1b5b3468 58",
+  "comment": "Fill row 0 with ABCDE. CUP(1,1) → (0,0). Enable IRM (CSI 4 h). Print 'X' → shifts ABCDE right, inserts X. Row 0 = XABCD (E falls off). Cursor at (0,1).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "rep_at_pending_wrap",
+  "description": "REP (CSI b) with pending wrap triggers wrap then repeats the character on the next line",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4141414141 1b5b3262",
+  "comment": "Print AAAAA (fills row 0, pending_wrap=true at col 4). REP 2 (CSI 2 b): repeats 'A' twice. First rep wraps to (1,0), second goes to (1,1). Row 0=AAAAA, row 1 starts with AA.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "A" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "il_dl_at_region_boundary",
+  "description": "IL/DL at scroll region boundaries: IL at bottom inserts blank, DL at top removes line",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41414141410d0a42424242420d0a43434343430d0a44444444440d0a4545454545 1b5b323b3472 1b5b343b3148 1b5b314c",
+  "comment": "Fill 5 rows AAAAA..EEEEE. Set scroll region 2;4 (rows 1-3). CUP(4,1) → cursor (3,0). IL 1 at bottom of region. Row 3 becomes blank, old row 3 (DDDDD) shifts out. Rows outside region unchanged.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 3, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
